items.originalTitle: Judge Denounces I.R.S. Suit as Improper Exercise in Self-Dealing
items.originalSummary: The decision did not explicitly kill the deal that President Trump had worked out with his own government to receive what amounted to amnesty from investigations into tax returns that he, his family and their businesses have already filed.
items.zhTitle: 法官斥国税局诉讼为不当自肥
items.zhSummary: 法官裁定国税局诉讼为不当自肥行为，但该裁决并未明确终止特朗普总统与政府达成的协议。该协议旨在免除对他、其家人及企业已提交税务申报的调查。

items.originalTitle: Trump renews Iran blockade and again threatens to take control of strait of Hormuz
items.originalSummary: US president declares strait open and demands tariff as both sides engage in heavy drone and missile exchanges Middle East crisis live – latest updates Donald Trump has once again threatened to take control of the strait of Hormuz, as he announced the reimposition of a naval blockade on Iran and demanded a 20% tariff for all cargoes shipped through the key maritime passage. Declaring the strait “open”, Trump suggested in a post on his Truth Social platform that the US should be known henceforth as the “Guardian of the Strait of Hormuz”, as Iran and the US engaged in some of the heaviest drone and missile exchanges since an interim deal was negotiated to bring an end to the conflict. Continue reading...
items.zhTitle: 特朗普再威胁控制霍尔木兹海峡，恢复对伊海上封锁。
items.zhSummary: 特朗普再次威胁控制霍尔木兹海峡，宣布恢复对伊朗的海上封锁，并要求所有通过该海峡的货物缴纳20%关税。此举正值美伊双方发生激烈无人机和导弹交火之际。

items.originalTitle: The Fed’s Christopher Waller Warns of Higher Rates if Inflation Stays High
items.originalSummary: Christopher J. Waller, a governor at the Federal Reserve, said he needs to see several months of lower inflation data to feel confident about the outlook.
items.zhTitle: 美联储沃勒警告：通胀若居高不下，利率恐将更高。
items.zhSummary: 美联储理事沃勒表示，若通胀持续高企，可能需要更高的利率。他强调，需看到连续数月通胀下降，才能对前景有信心。

items.originalTitle: EU chief pledges social media ban to protect children from ‘predatory algorithms’
items.originalSummary: Ursula von der Leyen’s commitment comes after panel of experts calls for restriction for under-13s The European Commission president, Ursula von der Leyen, has pledged an EU-wide social media ban for children after an expert group called for restrictions for those under 13. “It is clear we need age-appropriate restrictions to platforms,” von der Leyen told reporters after the publication of a report on child safety online. Continue reading...
items.zhTitle: 欧盟主席承诺禁止儿童使用社交媒体防范算法侵害
items.zhSummary: 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩承诺在欧盟范围内禁止儿童使用社交媒体。此前专家组呼吁对13岁以下儿童实施限制，以保护他们免受掠夺性算法侵害，确保平台有适龄限制。

items.originalTitle: 中国机器人技术热潮下，被抛弃的蓝领工人
items.originalSummary: 随着中国从低端制造业向先进技术转型，很多蓝领工人面临失业压力，许多人被迫转向零工经济。这些劳动者的困境凸显了中国在努力转型为高科技强国时所面临的挑战。 Vivian Wang/The New York Times 在中国制造业中心昆山，许多人正在寻找零工。随着中国向自动化转型，技术水平较低的工人越来越难找到稳定的工作机会。
items.zhTitle: 中国机器人技术热潮下，被抛弃的蓝领工人
items.zhSummary: 随着中国从低端制造业向先进技术转型，很多蓝领工人面临失业压力，许多人被迫转向零工经济。这些劳动者的困境凸显了中国在努力转型为高科技强国时所面临的挑战。

items.originalTitle: 普京如何将日本变成俄罗斯间谍据点
items.originalSummary: 薄弱的间谍法和繁荣的高科技产业使日本成为俄罗斯战争行动的关键一环。一个名为“第20局”的俄秘密情报部门在日本购买或窃取战争装备或技术，并走私到俄罗斯。 Chang W. Lee/The New York Times 位于东京一座大楼的俄罗斯国际航空公司办事处。宽松的间谍法以及蓬勃发展的高科技产业令日本成为俄罗斯战争行动的重要据点。
items.zhTitle: 普京如何将日本变成俄罗斯间谍据点
items.zhSummary: 薄弱的间谍法和繁荣的高科技产业使日本成为俄罗斯战争行动的关键一环。一个名为“第20局”的俄秘密情报部门在日本购买或窃取战争装备或技术，并走私到俄罗斯。
